footage_summary: Six 8s room clips of a modern 4-bed listing. The exterior golden-hour approach is the only clip with a strong establishing/hook beat, so it leads. The narration script walks the viewer kitchen -> living -> primary suite -> spa bath, so rooms are ordered to follow the VO; the hallway is used as a short connective transition into the bedroom wing.

clips.key_segment: golden-hour pan up the front walk to the two-storey modern facade
bright white chef kitchen, large island with seating, pendant lights, big window
open-concept living, floor-to-ceiling windows, sectional sofa, walk-in dolly
serene primary bedroom, made bed, soft window light
runner-lined hallway leading toward a bright window — connective transition
spa-like en-suite, freestanding soaking tub, matte-black fixtures

vo_rough_transcript: Discover an oasis where every detail elevates your daily life! Step into the expansive, light-filled living room, perfect for cherished gatherings. The chef-inspired kitchen, with its generous island and premium finishes, flows seamlessly for entertaining and culinary adventures. Retreat to the serene primary suite, a true sanctuary designed for relaxation. Its spa-like en-suite bath offers a luxurious, comforting escape. Imagine starting and ending your days here. Ready to experience this exceptional property? Contact us today to schedule your private showing and uncover your new beginning.
